TypeScript"}]," ","构建的高度复杂的 CLI 应用程序。它采用了一种独特的架构方案——将 React 组件模型引入终端环境， 通过自定义的"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"ink"}]," ","框架将 React 组件树渲染为 ANSI 终端输出。这意味着开发者可以像编写 Web 应用一样编写终端应用， 享受组件化、状态管理和声明式 UI 的所有优势。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"整个系统采用经典的分层架构，从底层的基础设施到顶层的用户界面，每一层都有明确的职责边界。 这种设计不仅使得代码易于理解和维护，还允许各层独立演进而不会产生连锁反应。"}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"Claude Code d:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"消息流","subtitle":"从用户输入到界面更新的完整旅程"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Claude Code 的核心是一个精心设计的消息处理管道。当用户在终端中输入一条指令时， 这条消息会经历一系列转换和处理步骤：从原始文本输入到智能上下文增强， 从 API 调用到工具执行，最终回到终端界面的渲染更新。 每一步都经过优化，确保用户体验流畅且响应迅速。"}]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"消息处理管道","nodes":[{"id":"msg-user","label":"用户输入","x":30,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"msg-textinput","label":"TextInput","x":220,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"msg-history","label":"对话历史","x":410,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"msg-query","label":"QueryEngine","x":30,"y":120,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"msg-git","label":"Git 状态","x":220,"y":120,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"msg-system","label":"System Prompt","x":410,"y":120,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"msg-api","label":"Claude API","x":30,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"msg-stream","label":"流式响应","x":220,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"msg-update","label":"UI rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold","style":{"background":"var(--accent-cyan)15","color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},"children":"1"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"用户输入捕获"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)]","children":"用户在终端中输入指令，TextInput 组件捕获输入，构建标准化的用户消息对象，并追加到对话历史中。"}]]}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"flex gap-4 p-4 rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold","style":{"background":"var(--accent-purple)15","color":"var(--accent-purple)"},"children":"2"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"QueryEngine 上下文增强"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)]","children":"QueryEngine 对消息进行上下文增强：获取 git 状态、项目信息、已注册工具列表和当前权限，构建完整的系统提示词。"}]]}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"flex gap-4 p-4 rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold","style":{"background":"var(--accent-blue)15","color":"var(--accent-blue)"},"children":"3"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"API 调用与流式响应"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)]","children":"将增强后的消息发送给 Claude API。启用流式响应（stream: true），每个 token 到达时立即更新终端显示，用户可以看到 Claude 的思考过程实时展开。"}]]}]]}],["$","div","4",{"className":"flex gap-4 p-4 rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold","style":{"background":"var(--text-secondary)15","color":"var(--text-secondary)"},"children":"4"}],"$L1a"]}],"$L1b"]}]]}]}]
e:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"状态管理","subtitle":"集中式状态与分布式上下文"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Claude Code 的状态管理采用了"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"集中式全局状态"}]," ","与"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"React Context"}]," ","相结合的混合方案。全局状态由"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"bootstrap/state.ts"}]," ","集中管理，包含应用生命周期中的关键数据；而 UI 相关的状态则通过 React Context 在组件树中分发， 确保每个组件都能获取所需的状态而无需层层传递 props。"]}]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"状态管理架构","nodes":[{"id":"gs-cwd","label":"originalCwd","x":10,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"gs-project","label":"projectRoot","x":180,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"gs-cost","label":"totalCostUSD","x":350,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"gs-session","label":"sessionId","x":520,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"gs-interactive","label":"isInteractive","x":10,"y":100,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"gs-client","label":"clientType","x":180,"y":100,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"gs-kairos","label":"kairosActive","x":350,"y":100,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"ui-notif","label":"notifications","x":10,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"ui-overlay","label":"overlay","x":180,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"ui-prompt","label":"prompt","x":350,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"ui-loading","label":"isLoading","x":520,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"store-bootstrap","label":"Bootstrap","x":100,"y":320,"color":"var(--text-secondary)"},{"id":"store-memdir","label":"memdir 1b:["$","div","5",{"className":"flex gap-4 p-4 rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold","style":{"background":"var(--accent-cyan)15","color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},"children":"5"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"工具结果反馈与对话循环"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)]","children":"工具执行完毕后，结果被包装为 tool_result 消息追加到对话历史，然后反馈给 Claude 继续推理。整个循环会持续进行，直到 Claude 给出最终回复。"}]]}]]}]

1e:["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":"每个工具可以定义自己的权限检查逻辑。例如文件操作工具会检查路径是否在项目目录内，网络工具会检查 URL 是否在白名单中。这种细粒度的控制确保了工具只能执行被允许的操作。"}]
